import io
import string
import list

fn gcd(_ a: Int, _ b: Int) -> Int
  mut x = a
  mut y = b
  while y != 0
    let t = x % y
    x = y
    y = t
  end
  x
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let parts = string.split_whitespace(input)
let a_str = parts.get(0).ok_or("missing a")
let b_str = parts.get(1).ok_or("missing b")

mut a = 0
mut b = 0
match a_str
when Ok(s)
  match string.parse_int(s)
  when Some(n)
    a = n
  when None
    a = 0
  end
when Err(_)
  a = 0
end

match b_str
when Ok(s)
  match string.parse_int(s)
  when Some(n)
    b = n
  when None
    b = 0
  end
when Err(_)
  b = 0
end

let g = gcd(a, b)
println("gcd=#{g}")
